title: 現時点のディスクリプション

text_block_list.name: Group of Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Come on, let's go! One, two! One, two!

The runners' chants are drowned out by the sound
of their footsteps. Each of them is working hard
every single day in pursuit of their dreams.

We've set our sights on the Asahi Hai F.S. as our
next goal, but, being a G1 race, it's tough to
even qualify.

However, given Biwa Hayahide's potential, we're
not worried.

As long as she keeps gaining experience and
improving...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh, you're here too.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I guess I'm not one to speak. I'm here to watch her
too. It's impossible not to get drawn in by her
running.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
...She's always been fascinating to watch, since
ages back.
I turn to see where she's looking.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Raaah! I'm gonna beat you today, for sure!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Oh, be quiet.

Standing on the track is Hishi Amazon, the
hot-blooded leader of Miho Dormitory. She's still
awaiting her debut.

And next to her is Biwa Hayahide's younger sister,
the Umamusume who's captured everyone's
attention—Narita Brian.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. C'mon, you can afford to loosen up a bit.
How far are we racin', anyway?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: 1,600 meters.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
A mile, huh? That's unexpected. Any reason for
picking that particular distance?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Because I wanna run the whole thing full tilt. I
crave that speed—I need to go all out!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Planning to leave me in the dust right from the
get-go, huh? Hah! Bring it! This is gonna be one
helluva race!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Referee
text_block_list.text: Are you both ready? On your marks! Get set...
It's an amazing race.

They compete against each other with an almost
feral ferocity. Everyone's eyes are glued to the
intense action.

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Come on, Hishiama! You can do it, Brian!
But then, in the final stretch of the race...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hmph!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Gasp!
Whoooosh!

Narita Brian unleashes a terrifying burst of speed
that slices through the noise of the crowd, leaving
the spectators silent.

An unsettling feeling washes over me as I wonder
what would happen if Narita Brian and Biwa
Hayahide were to compete...

Even if Hayahide chased after her at full speed,
would she ever be able to catch up?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Trainer? Are you all right?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, if you say so. But that was quite the intense
look you had on.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: It was the same face I made long ago...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I know how you feel. Here, let me make use of
what I experienced before and put your feelings
into words.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Narita Brian is an Umamusume worthy of one day being called the best.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Only fools would try to compete with her in light
of her extraordinary talent.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I was that foolish once as a child. One moment I
was running free, the next, I'd been overtaken. I
was scared of losing, so I panicked...
Crash!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I tried to catch up with her... and that's when I got
hurt.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Lying in that hospital bed, I had nothing but time
to think. And that's when—
choice_data_list:
That's when you started working nonstop on
your winning equation, right?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hehe, that's right. And now I work on it with a strange trainer who took more interest in my potential than my sister's.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
We might actually be the biggest fools in the
whole world.
HAYAHIDEEE!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Uh-oh. I think this is as far as our talk is going to
get.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hello, Ticket. And you, too, Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Sometimes I wish this wild child came with an off switch.

Narita Taishin is Biwa Hayahide's friend who just
debuted this year. Her slight frame belies her
ability to run at unimaginable speed.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You seriously need to learn to read the room.
Couldn't you see they were talking?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Well, I mean, I saw Hayahide, so of course I had to come and say hi!

Winning Ticket is an energetic Umamusume and
one of Biwa Hayahide's classmates. I've heard the
three of them are close friends.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Plus, there's something I absolutely have to say! I don't know if you realized, but all three of us...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Have made our debut! Congratulations t-to sob... everyooone! Waaaah!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Okay, but why are you crying?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, never mind—hurry it up. Don't you have
something else to say?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Oh my gosh, that's right! Sorry! Okay, since we're
all here, why don't we go on a run?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: We can do 2,400 meters, just like that one time!
choice_data_list: What time are you talking about?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
A time from ages ago. When we first started here,
we had to measure our times for class, and Ticket
had the idea to run 2,400 meters for it.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Because the Derby is 2,400 meters long!
choice_data_list:
(She must be talking about the Japanese
Derby...)

text_block_list.text:
Umamusume can only take part in this prestigious
race once in their lives. It's an honor every racer
aspires to.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Normally, new students only run 1,000 meters,
but... we all just went for it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Who do you think?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
The three of us! And after that, we started doing
everything together. Hehe, those were great
times.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
That's right! So Let's recreate it—just like this!
RAAAGGGHHH!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hey, wait up! Where are you going, dummy?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Aaand they're off. Mind if I join them?
choice_data_list: Go. And don't you dare lose!
Go. And don't you dare lose!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: You know I won't!

She runs off in pursuit of Winning Ticket and
Narita Taishin.

I wonder how much longer times like these will
last...
The next day, I hear a rumor.

Apparently, Narita Taishin and Winning Ticket
will be entering the Hopeful Stakes, a junior G1
race.

It's not the same as the Asahi Hai F.S. that Biwa
Hayahide will be entering, but it's still a G1... And
it's the highest junior level race.

It would appear that Narita Brian isn't the only
fierce rival out there.
